faqs.question: What types of flies are common in Pelham Manor homes?
faqs.answer: Pelham Manor residents most commonly encounter house flies, fruit flies, drain flies, and cluster flies. The village's older homes and proximity to wooded areas can attract cluster flies in fall, while kitchens and outdoor garbage areas typically see house flies and fruit flies during summer months.
